description_long: This is an elongated, irregularly shaped stone with a layered, striated surface that displays a mix of pale yellow, beige, and grayish tones. The stone has a rough, jagged edge on one side and a flatter, more planar surface on the opposite side, suggesting it may have fractured naturally. Subtle color banding and mineral veining are visible along its length, giving it a distinctive, sedimentary appearance. The stone's surface is matte and uneven, with visible textural ridges and minor chips, indicating exposure to weathering. Its size and form suggest it could serve as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban park, garden, or roadside setting. The overall impression is of a solid, heavy object that would be difficult to move without significant effort.
description: A long, layered stone with rough, striated surfaces in pale yellow and gray, featuring jagged edges and visible mineral veining. Its weathered, matte finish and irregular shape make it a natural-looking urban barrier.
description_view_0: The stone appears elongated with a prominent jagged edge and visible striations along its length, showing the most detail of its layered structure.
description_view_1: This view highlights the stone's narrow end, revealing a more compact profile and the thickness of its layers.
description_view_2: The broad, flat surface of the stone is visible, emphasizing the pale coloration and subtle banding with minimal edge detail.
description_view_3: The stone is seen from its side, showing the vertical extent of the layers and the rough, uneven edge along one side.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or edge barrier
attribute_pattern: Layered striations and subtle mineral veining run lengthwise, with irregular, natural banding and no artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Rough and matte with minor chips and surface ridges, indicating moderate natural weathering and exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil and other stones, providing a subtle contrast to manicured urban landscaping and hardscape elements.
